title: [Origin] Cloud Bunny
description: An origin that likes jumping from cloud to cloud
body:
# General Information
This datapack adds the Cloud Bunny Origin and it requires Origins and Pehkui to work.

## Cloud Bunny 🟡🟡
When a bunny dies, their soul rises to heaven.
The bravest, however, ascend into the sky, merging with the clouds and becoming one with them.

**🟢 Air Affinity**                                                                           
You fall a lot slower and you may break blocks in the air as on the ground.
Furthermore, you are significantly faster while airborne and take more knockback.

**🔵 Air Jump**                                                                               
You can jump midair at the cost of hunger.
(You cannot use elytras)

**🟢 Above the Sky**                                                                            
While above cloud level, you can fly freely.
Additionally, you can place white wool blocks from your offhand beneath you while sneaking.

**🔵 Breeze**                                                                                 
Although you are weaker than most, you can manipulate the wind to your will.
You may repel foes, draw them closer, or send them soaring into the sky.                       
(With your Secondary Ability you can switch between 4 modes: [Normal], ^Launch^, <Repel> and >Pull< )

**🔵 Breeze Burst**                                                                                 
This ability is very similar to **Breeze**, but it affects all entities in your surroundings and is more exhausting.                                                                           
(Depending on the selected mode, this ability will launch, repel or pull nearby entities or perform a ranged attack)

**🟡 Soggy**                                                                                     
Contact with water causes you to become soggy.
As the moisture builds up, your defense increases, but your control over the wind weakens, reducing your knockback.
Sogginess drains when you attack or take damage.

**🔴 Grounded**                                                                                   
You are significantly slower on the ground and cannot sprint.

**🔴 Small Stature**                                                                            
You are smaller than a human, have two fewer hearts, and are weaker.
But you exhaust slower than others.

**🔴 Unwieldy**                                                                                   
The way your paws are formed prevents you from using ranged weapons.

**🔴Vegetarian**                                                                                
Your body cannot digest meat.                                                                         
Carrots and Golden Carrots will fill you up more.

**🔴 Skybound**                                                                                 
Your bed must be close to the clouds and exposed to the sky in order to sleep.                  
(Your bed must be between Y 180 & 210)

**🔴 Lightweight**                                                                                      
You can not wear any armor heavier than iron.
